title: geranium heterophyllum
intro: Geranium heterophyllum, also known as the lesser crane's-bill or Mexican geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms of wounds, ulcers, and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Geranium heterophyllum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
